steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize Atitalaquía's size. Only one note gives a size measurement: it covers roughly 63 km². Any choice that omits or ignores this detail cannot accomplish the goal.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Providing street lighting is just one example of the public services that municipalities provide.: Discusses public services, not size. ✗
  • Choice B — Atitalaquía is one of 84 governmental regions, known as municipalities, across Hidalgo.: Emphasizes Hidalgo's governmental count, not Atitalaquía's physical size. ✗
  • Choice C — Atitalaquía—a governmental region in the state of Hidalgo, Mexico—provides many public services to its residents.: Describes governmental function, not size. ✗
  • Choice D — The municipality of Atitalaquía in Hidalgo, Mexico, covers an area of roughly 63 km 2.: Directly states the area measurement from the notes, emphasizing size. ✓
That matches Choice D — The municipality of Atitalaquía in Hidalgo, Mexico, covers an area of roughly 63 km 2..
